signals.headline: MicroStrategy Announces 34,164 BTC Purchase on April 20, Total Holdings Hit 815,061 BTC; Reports 6
signals.raw:
MicroStrategy Announces 34,164 BTC Purchase on April 20, Total Holdings Hit 815,061 BTC; Reports 6.2% April Bitcoin Yield** | **YES** | **HIGH**  
MicroStrategy acquired 34,164 BTC for $2.54 billion at $74,395 average price as of April 19, overtaking BlackRock’s ETF and generating 47,079 BTC ($3.6B) gains in April's first three weeks, per Michael Saylor's X update.[1]
